changeSet.author: tdd-swarm-team
changeSet.comment:
Fix entity-migration synchronization issue: Convert score columns from decimal(5,2) to DOUBLE PRECISION
Root Cause: JPA entities use Double (expects DOUBLE PRECISION) but migrations used decimal(5,2) (creates NUMERIC). This mismatch causes schema validation failures with ddl-auto: validate on fresh databases.
Impact: 7 columns in health_scores table Pattern: Follows existing fix from migrations 0032/0033 for chronic_disease_monitoring

changeSet.author: tdd-swarm-team
changeSet.comment:
Fix entity-migration synchronization issue: Convert score columns from decimal(5,2) to DOUBLE PRECISION
Impact: 8 columns in health_score_history table (7 score columns + score_delta)
